Localization.Description: A legitimate LOLBins process accessed or dumped the LSASS process memory

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} saved the contents of the LSASS process memory to file "{object.name}" using legitimate process {reason} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} accessed the contents of the LSASS process memory using legitimate process {reason} on host {event_src.host}
